title: Toggle Beacon Beams
description: Adds a simple beacon beam toggle button to the beacon UI
body: # Toggle Beacon Beams ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loaders-Fabric%2fQuilt%2fNeoForge-darkcyan?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Versions-1.21.11_|_26.1_|_26.2-darkcyan?style=for-the-badge) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environments-Client_+_Server-darkcyan?style=for-the-badge) ### Adds a simple beacon beam toggle button to the beacon UI! - **A simple toggle button within the beacon UI to turn individual beacon beams on and off** - **Config toggle to hide all beacon beams client-side** - **Full multiplayer support, with synced toggles when installed on both the client and server** - **Without the server-side mod, toggles now automatically fall back to client-only mode!** #### For any issues or feature requests, please make a report on [GitHub](https://github.com/CoolAid48/Toggle-Beacon-Beams/issues) [](https://ko-fi.com/coolaid48) [](https://discord.gg/J2SGshKNah) [](https://www.twitch.tv/coolaid48) ![Toggle Beacon Beams mod demo video](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1031fce0d3f9da58e51ab8784172bedeb3fa454.gif) ## Looking for a server host? ![server hosting partner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e85210a65b7c17998987c57b7571ba2fbd19bfb.png)
